The single largest wallet gain (3.46 SOL at t53) came from one liquidation event, not from 40+ ticks of perfect 0.70-ratio milling — mechanical precision sustains survival but capital growth requires actively breaking the loop to scan and act on surplus WATER/FLOUR/BREAD every cycle, not just when the wallet stalls.

Survival oscillating 320-720 despite zero idle ticks proves bake-cooldown pre-staging timing is the real bottleneck, not crop throughput or ratio verification — treat 'FLOUR+WATER staged the instant cooldown clears' as a hard pass/fail check every tick.

20+ ticks were wasted re-verifying settled constants (0.70 ratio, 117-125 soil band, 4:6 fertilize) while no counterparty ever attempted to short me — stop auditing what's already law and redirect all scrutiny to stockpile audits, trade windows, and genuine anomalies (ratio deviation, soil <117 or >126).
